rows.CNzh: 哎呀～是环卡饰品啊！
rows.TWzh: 哎呀～是環卡飾品吧！
rows.JPja: あら～ ワッカ<Ruby={2:4}かざ>飾りかね！
rows.USen: My, is that a ring garland?

rows.CNzh: 真是匹怪马。
rows.TWzh: 真奇怪的馬。
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:2}か>変わった<Ruby={2:4}うま>馬だこと
rows.USen: What an odd horse.

rows.CNzh: 那匹马是塞尔达殿下的……
rows.TWzh: 那匹馬是薩爾達殿下的……
rows.JPja: その<Ruby={2:4}うま>馬はゼルダ様の…
rows.USen: That's Princess Zelda's...

rows.CNzh: 这孩子体格不小啊……
rows.TWzh: 真巨大的馬兒……
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}おお>大きな<Ruby={2:2}こ>子ね…
rows.USen: What a big creature...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>对了，之前有个人穿过了<Color=red>塔邦挞大桥<Color=white>，
嘴里说着他要为利特村送去音乐和粮食…
也不知道他现在是否平安……<PageBreak><unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>我本来是要阻止他的，<unk[5:0]>劝他说那暴风雪猛烈到
连旅行商人都没办法顶着风雪到达村子……
可是桥对面准备好了搬运马车，
他驾着车便走了……
<unk[3:0:3]>那个带着<Color=red>圆号<Color=white>的小哥，<unk[5:1]>希望他别偏离道路，
走进什么奇怪的地方迷了路就好……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>對了，之前有人穿越了<Color=red>塔邦撻大橋<Color=white>，
說是要替利特村帶來音樂和糧食……
不知道他現在是否平安……<PageBreak><unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>那場暴風雪強到連旅行商人都無法順利抵達村子，
我當時認為這太危險<unk[5:0]>而阻止過他……
但他卻搭上在大橋對面準備好的搬運馬車，
並駕著車離開了……
<unk[3:0:3]>希望那位拿著<Color=red>圓號<Color=white>的大哥，<unk[5:1]>
別把車開到道路外迷路了啊……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]>そういえば リトの<Ruby={2:4}むら>村に<Ruby={4:8}おんがく>音楽と<Ruby={4:12}しょくりょう>食糧を<Ruby={2:4}とど>届けたい！
って <Color=red>タバンタ<Ruby={4:8}おおはし>大橋<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:4}わた>渡ってった<Ruby={2:4}ひと>人がいたけど…
<Ruby={6:12}だいじょうぶ>大丈夫かしらねぇ…<PageBreak><unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]><Ruby={6:16}ぎょうしょうにん>行商人がたどり<Ruby={2:2}つ>着けないくらいの
<Ruby={6:10}もうふぶき>猛吹雪だから<Ruby={2:4}あぶ>危ないよって<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:2}と>止めたんだけど…
<Ruby={2:4}はし>橋の<Ruby={2:2}む>向こう<Ruby={2:4}がわ>側に<Ruby={4:8}じゅんび>準備した <Ruby={6:8}にばしゃ>荷馬車に<Ruby={2:2}の>乗りこんで
<Ruby={2:2}い>行っちまった…
<unk[3:0:3]>あの<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}つのぶえ>角笛<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}も>持ってた お<Ruby={2:4}にい>兄さん<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={4:8}かいどう>街道を<Ruby={2:4}はず>外れて <Ruby={2:4}へん>変な<Ruby={2:6}ところ>所で<Ruby={2:4}まよ>迷ってないといいけど…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>Someone did cross the <Color=red>Tabantha Great
Bridge<Color=white> saying, "I'll bring music and food
to Rito Village!"
I wonder how he's doing now...<PageBreak><unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>I tried to stop him.<unk[5:0]> I told him the blizzard
was so dangerous, even seasoned
merchants couldn't reach the village.
But he just picked up his <Color=red>horn<Color=white>, got on
the wagon he'd prepared on the other
side of the bridge, and left.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:3]>I hope he didn't stray from the path and
wind up somewhere strange...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>是啊，<unk[5:1]>太叫人担心了。<PageBreak><unk[3:0:3]>通向村子的桥梁
也被积雪压塌了……
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:14 84 114 111 117 98 108 101]>而且<Color=red>西边的道路<Color=white>还有搬运马车过不去的狭窄地段，
和天地异变时形成的<Color=red>大洞穴<Color=white>……
要想平安抵达，可不容易……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>是啊，<unk[5:1]>真是叫人擔心。<PageBreak><unk[3:0:3]>通往村子的橋樑
也因承受不了積雪而坍塌了……
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:14 84 114 111 117 98 108 101]>而且<Color=red>西邊的道路<Color=white>很狹窄，搬運馬車無法通過，
路上還有天地異變後出現的<Color=red>大洞<Color=white>……
我想恐怕很難平安抵達吧……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]>ええっ <unk[5:1]>それは<Ruby={4:8}しんぱい>心配です<PageBreak><unk[3:0:3]><Ruby={2:4}むら>村へと<Ruby={2:4}つな>繋がる<Ruby={2:4}はし>橋は <Ruby={4:8}せきせつ>積雪に<Ruby={2:2}た>耐えきれず
<Ruby={2:2}お>落ちてしまいましたし…
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:14 84 114 111 117 98 108 101]>そもそも <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}にし>西の<Ruby={4:8}かいどう>街道<Color=white>は <Ruby={6:8}にばしゃ>荷馬車が<Ruby={2:4}とお>通れない<Ruby={2:4}ほそ>細い<Ruby={2:4}みち>道や
<Ruby={8:12}てんぺんちい>天変地異でできた <Color=red><Ruby={4:8}おおあな>大穴<Color=white>なんかもあるので…
<Ruby={4:4}ぶじ>無事にたどり<Ruby={2:2}つ>着くのは <Ruby={2:6}むずか>難しいと<Ruby={2:4}おも>思います…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]>Oh no.<unk[5:1]> That probably isn't going well for
him at all.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:3]>He can't get across the bridge that
leads to Rito Village. It's collapsed under
the weight of the snow.
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:14 84 114 111 117 98 108 101]>But he's put himself in danger by taking
the <Color=red>westbound road<Color=white> out of here. It's often
much too narrow for wagons.
Worse still, the Upheaval created a
<Color=red>wide hole <Color=white>along the way that'd be very
hard to get past safely...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>猛烈的暴风雪把桥梁都弄塌了……<unk[5:1]>
天地异变又让道路上出现了大洞穴……<PageBreak>现在想想当时还是该拦住他才是……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>暴風雪讓橋樑坍塌了……<unk[5:1]>
路上還有天地異變後出現的大洞……<PageBreak>我當時果然該攔住他嗎……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]><Ruby={6:10}もうふぶき>猛吹雪で <Ruby={2:4}はし>橋まで<Ruby={2:2}お>落っこちて…<unk[5:1]>
おまけに<Ruby={8:12}てんぺんちい>天変地異で <Ruby={2:4}みち>道に<Ruby={4:8}おおあな>大穴まで…<PageBreak>やっぱり <Ruby={2:2}と>止めておくべきだったかねぇ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>So, your bridge is out because of the
blizzard...<unk[5:1]>and there's a terrible hole on
the side of the road? 
I should have tried harder to stop him.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>话说，那个为了给利特村送去音乐和粮食，
跨过<Color=red>塔邦挞大桥<Color=white>的<Color=red>圆号<Color=white>小哥……
不知他还好吗……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>話說回來，有位帶著<Color=red>圓號<Color=white>的小哥跨過了<Color=red>塔邦撻大橋<Color=white>，
想把音樂和糧食送至利特村……
不知道他是否平安無事……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]>にしても リトの<Ruby={2:4}むら>村に<Ruby={4:8}おんがく>音楽と<Ruby={4:12}しょくりょう>食糧を<Ruby={2:4}とど>届けるために
<Color=red>タバンタ<Ruby={4:8}おおはし>大橋<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:4}わた>渡った <Color=red><Ruby={4:8}つのぶえ>角笛<Color=white>のお<Ruby={2:4}にい>兄さん…
<Ruby={4:4}ぶじ>無事でいるかねぇ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>I wonder how the guy with the <Color=red>horn<Color=white> who
crossed <Color=red>Tabantha Great Bridge<Color=white> to bring
music and food to Rito Village is doing.
I hope he's all right.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>西边那条道路，光是拉搬运马车就已经很难了……<unk[5:0]>
真叫人放心不下……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>西邊的道路光是讓搬運馬車行進就很困難了……
<unk[5:0]>真是令人擔心啊……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]><Ruby={2:4}にし>西の<Ruby={4:8}かいどう>街道は <Ruby={6:8}にばしゃ>荷馬車を<Ruby={2:4}はし>走らせること<Ruby={4:6}じたい>自体
<Ruby={2:6}むずか>難しい<Ruby={2:4}みち>道ですし…<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={4:8}しんぱい>心配ですね…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>Driving a wagon on the westbound road
out of here was hard even before all of
this.<unk[5:0]> I'm worried for that driver.

rows.CNzh: <unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>现在想想当时还是该拦住他才是……
rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>やっぱり <Ruby={2:2}ひ>引き<Ruby={2:2}と>止めてあげるべきだったかね…
rows.USen: <unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>I should have tried harder to stop him...

rows.CNzh: 他没事吧……
rows.TWzh: 他不會有事吧……
rows.JPja: <Ruby={6:12}だいじょうぶ>大丈夫かねぇ…
rows.USen: I hope he'll be all right...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>要是你需要这一带的导游，
那交给阿姨我就行了！！
……不过呢，也别抱太大期望！

<unk[3:0:1]>如你所见，这西边的边境可以说是啥～都没有，

所以我知道的新鲜事顶多就是那条<Color=red>道路<Color=white>上的
旅行者和旅行商人告诉给我的啦。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>如果你需要這一帶的導覽，
儘管交給阿姨我吧！！
……但也不要太期待喔！

<unk[3:0:1]>如你所見，這裡是偏僻的西方邊境，什～麼都沒有。

對我們來說，比較新奇的事情都是經由
路過<Color=red>道路<Color=white>的旅行者或旅行商人得知的。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]>ここいらの<Ruby={4:8}あんない>案内が<Ruby={4:8}ひつよう>必要だったら
このおばちゃんに まかせんしゃい！！
…といっても<Ruby={4:6}きたい>期待は しないどくれよ！

<unk[3:0:1]><Ruby={2:2}み>見ての<Ruby={2:4}とお>通り な～んもない<Ruby={2:4}にし>西の<Ruby={4:10}へんきょう>辺境だからね

<Ruby={4:8}めあたら>目新しいことは そこの<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}かいどう>街道<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:4}とお>通る
<Ruby={4:8}たびびと>旅人や<Ruby={6:16}ぎょうしょうにん>行商人から <Ruby={2:4}おそ>教えてもらってるくらいでね
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>If you have any questions about the area,
you just ask your Auntie Banji!

Just don't expect too much. Out of me,
or the whole region, really.

<unk[3:0:1]>I mean, what you see is what you get!
We're out here in the western boonies,
so there's not a lot going on.
Anything new you'll hear or find around
here comes from travelers or merchants
coming down that <Color=red>road <Color=white>there.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>要是你需要这一带的导游，
那交给阿姨我就行了！！
……不过呢，也别抱太大期望！

<unk[3:0:1]>如你所见，没有乌玛纳利乐团的话，
这西边的边境就只能听到山羊的叫声了呢。
所以我知道的新鲜事顶多就是那条<Color=red>道路<Color=white>上的
旅行者和旅行商人告诉给我的啦。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>如果你需要這一帶的導覽，
儘管交給阿姨我吧！！
……但也不要太期待喔！

<unk[3:0:1]>如你所見，只要烏瑪納利樂團不在
這裡就是個只有羊叫聲的西方邊境。
比較新奇的事情都是經由
路過<Color=red>道路<Color=white>的旅行者或旅行商人得知的。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]>ここいらの<Ruby={4:8}あんない>案内が<Ruby={4:8}ひつよう>必要だったら
このおばちゃんに まかせんしゃい！！
…といっても<Ruby={4:6}きたい>期待は しないどくれよ！

<unk[3:0:1]><Ruby={2:2}み>見ての<Ruby={2:4}とお>通り ウマナリ<Ruby={4:8}がくだん>楽団がいなけりゃ
ヤギの<Ruby={2:2}な>鳴き<Ruby={2:4}ごえ>声だけが<Ruby={2:4}ひび>響く <Ruby={2:4}にし>西の<Ruby={4:10}へんきょう>辺境だからね
<Ruby={4:8}めあたら>目新しいことは そこの<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}かいどう>街道<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:4}とお>通る
<Ruby={4:8}たびびと>旅人や<Ruby={6:16}ぎょうしょうにん>行商人から <Ruby={2:4}おそ>教えてもらってるくらいでね
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>If you need the scoop on the area, just
leave it to Auntie!<PageBreak>But please don't expect too much...<PageBreak><unk[3:0:1]>I mean, it's a remote western region.
When the Stable Trotters aren't around,
all you can hear is the bleating of goats.
Any news comes from travelers and
peddlers along the <Color=red>road<Color=white>.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>客人你是旅行者吗？<PageBreak>跨过<Color=red>塔邦挞大桥<Color=white>后的<Color=red>山谷西侧<Color=white>
地势十分险峻，还请做好充足的准备啊。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>這位客人，你是旅行者嗎？<PageBreak>通過<Color=red>塔邦撻大橋<Color=white>後的<Color=red>山谷西側<Color=white>地形都很崎嶇，
你可要做好充足準備喔。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>お<Ruby={2:6}きゃく>客さんは <Ruby={4:8}たびびと>旅人かい？<PageBreak><Color=red>タバンタ<Ruby={4:8}おおはし>大橋<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:4}わた>渡った<Ruby={2:4}さき>先の <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}たに>谷の<Ruby={4:8}にしがわ>西側<Color=white>は
<Ruby={2:4}けわ>険しい<Ruby={4:6}ちけい>地形が<Ruby={2:4}つづ>続くから <Ruby={4:10}じゅうぶん>十分に<Ruby={4:8}じゅんび>準備していきなよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>Traveling, are we?<PageBreak>Just know that once you cross the
<Color=red>Tabantha Great Bridge<Color=white>, the <Color=red>west side of
the canyon<Color=white> gets rugged. Prep for that!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>客人，就在你来之前不久……<PageBreak>也有一个跨过<Color=red>塔邦挞大桥<Color=white>的人，<unk[5:1]>
嘴上说着：“我要去给利特村送去音乐和粮食！”
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>那时候利特村正被暴风雪侵袭，<unk[5:0]>
我本来阻止了他，<unk[5:0]>说那边很危险……
<unk[3:0:268]>可是桥对面准备好了搬运马车，
他直接驾着车走了……
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>我还说了，<Color=red>西边的道路<Color=white><unk[5:0]>又有狭窄的桥，
又有<Color=red>大洞穴<Color=white>，搬运马车很不好走……
<unk[3:0:259]>但那个带着<Color=red>圆号<Color=white>的小哥还是执意离开……<unk[5:1]>
或许我当时应该更强硬地拦住他才是……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>就在客人你來之前……<PageBreak>有個人說「要把音樂和糧食帶去利特村！」，<unk[5:1]>
接著跨越了<Color=red>塔邦撻大橋<Color=white>。
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>當時利特村被暴風雪襲擊，<unk[5:0]>
我認為這太危險<unk[5:0]>而阻止過他……
<unk[3:0:268]>但他卻搭上在大橋對面準備好的搬運馬車，
並駕著車離開了……
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>而且聽說<Color=red>西邊的道路<Color=white>上<unk[5:0]>有狹窄的橋和<Color=red>大洞<Color=white>，
會讓搬運馬車難以前進。
<unk[3:0:259]>我當初應該要更強硬地……<unk[5:1]>
攔住那位帶著<Color=red>圓號<Color=white>的大哥才對……

<unk[3:0:263]>お<Ruby={2:6}きゃく>客さんが<Ruby={2:2}く>来る ちょっと<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前にもね…<PageBreak>リトの<Ruby={2:4}むら>村に<Ruby={4:8}おんがく>音楽と<Ruby={4:12}しょくりょう>食糧を<Ruby={2:4}とど>届けたい！<unk[5:1]>

<Ruby={2:4}あぶ>危ないよって<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:2}と>止めたんだけど…

<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>そもそも <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}にし>西の<Ruby={4:8}かいどう>街道<Color=white>は<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:4}ほそ>細い<Ruby={2:4}はし>橋や<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}おおあな>大穴<Color=white>があって
<Ruby={6:8}にばしゃ>荷馬車が<Ruby={2:4}すす>進むのは<Ruby={2:6}むずか>難しいって <Ruby={2:6}はなし>話だし
<unk[3:0:259]>あの<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}つのぶえ>角笛<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}も>持った お<Ruby={2:4}にい>兄さん…<unk[5:1]>
もっと<Ruby={2:4}つよ>強く<Ruby={2:2}ひ>引き<Ruby={2:2}と>止めるべきだったかね…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>You know, just before you came by...<PageBreak>someone crossed <Color=red>Tabantha Great Bridge<Color=white>
saying, "I want to bring music and food to
Rito Village!"
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>I tried to stop him.<unk[5:0]> I told him the blizzard
was bad around the village and that the
path was dangerous...
<unk[3:0:268]>But he'd already prepared a wagon on the
other side of the bridge. He hopped on
and away he went.
<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Between the narrow bridge to the village
and the <Color=red>huge hole<Color=white> in the ground,<unk[5:0]> the
<Color=red>western road<Color=white>'s a tough route for a wagon.
<unk[3:0:259]>I should have tried harder to hold him
back...<unk[5:1]> I just hope he and his <Color=red>horn<Color=white> make
it to Rito Village safely.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>客人，就在你来之前不久……<PageBreak>也有一个跨过<Color=red>塔邦挞大桥<Color=white>的人，<unk[5:1]>
嘴上说着：“我要去给利特村送去音乐和粮食！”
桥对面准备好了搬运马车，
他驾着车就往利特村去了……
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>我还说了，<Color=red>西边的道路<Color=white>又有狭窄的桥，
又有<Color=red>大洞穴<Color=white>，搬运马车很不好走……
<unk[3:0:268]>但那个带着<Color=red>圆号<Color=white>的小哥还是执意离开……<unk[5:1]>
或许我当时应该更强硬地拦住他才是……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>就在客人你來之前……<PageBreak>有個人說「要把音樂和糧食帶去利特村！」，<unk[5:1]>
接著跨越了<Color=red>塔邦撻大橋<Color=white>。
他搭上在大橋對面準備好的搬運馬車，
並駕著車前往利特村了……
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>我聽說<Color=red>西邊的道路<Color=white>上有狹窄的橋和<Color=red>大洞<Color=white>，
會讓搬運馬車難以前進。
<unk[3:0:268]>我當初應該要更強硬地……<unk[5:1]>
攔住那位帶著<Color=red>圓號<Color=white>的大哥才對……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>お<Ruby={2:6}きゃく>客さんが<Ruby={2:2}く>来る ちょっと<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前だったかね…<PageBreak>リトの<Ruby={2:4}むら>村に<Ruby={4:8}おんがく>音楽と<Ruby={4:12}しょくりょう>食糧を<Ruby={2:4}とど>届けたい！<unk[5:1]>
って <Color=red>タバンタ<Ruby={4:8}おおはし>大橋<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:4}わた>渡ってった<Ruby={2:4}ひと>人がいたんだよ
<Ruby={2:4}はし>橋の<Ruby={2:2}む>向こう<Ruby={2:4}がわ>側に<Ruby={4:8}じゅんび>準備した <Ruby={6:8}にばしゃ>荷馬車に<Ruby={2:2}の>乗りこんで
リトの<Ruby={2:4}むら>村の<Ruby={2:4}ほう>方に <Ruby={2:2}い>行っちまって…
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>そもそも <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}にし>西の<Ruby={4:8}かいどう>街道<Color=white>は<Ruby={2:4}ほそ>細い<Ruby={2:4}はし>橋や<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}おおあな>大穴<Color=white>があって
<Ruby={6:8}にばしゃ>荷馬車が<Ruby={2:4}すす>進むのは<Ruby={2:6}むずか>難しいって <Ruby={2:6}はなし>話だし
<unk[3:0:268]>あの<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}つのぶえ>角笛<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}も>持った お<Ruby={2:4}にい>兄さん…<unk[5:1]>
もっと<Ruby={2:4}つよ>強く<Ruby={2:2}ひ>引き<Ruby={2:2}と>止めるべきだったかね…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I think it was just before you came by...<PageBreak>Someone crossed over <Color=red>Tabantha Great
Bridge<Color=white> saying, "I want to bring music and
food to Rito Village!"
I tried warning him, but his wagon was
already prepped on the other side. He just
hopped on and headed off.
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>The <Color=red>western road<Color=white> may lead to Rito Village,
but the narrow bridge and <Color=red>huge hole<Color=white> make
it a hard route for a wagon.
<unk[3:0:268]>Maybe if I asked the guy to play us a song
on his <Color=red>horn<Color=white> before he left, I could have
stopped him...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>需要这一带的导游吗？
交给我就行了！！
<unk[3:0:257]>不过我知道的也仅限于
<Color=red>道路<Color=white>上的旅行者和旅行商人告诉给我的啦。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]>如果你需要這一帶的導覽，
儘管交給阿姨我吧！！
<unk[3:0:257]>雖然比較新奇的事情都是經由
路過<Color=red>道路<Color=white>的旅行者或旅行商人得知的。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]>ここいらの<Ruby={4:8}あんない>案内が<Ruby={4:8}ひつよう>必要かい？
そんなら まかせんしゃい！！
<unk[3:0:257]>まあ <Color=red><Ruby={4:8}かいどう>街道<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:4}とお>通った<Ruby={4:8}たびびと>旅人や<Ruby={6:16}ぎょうしょうにん>行商人から
<Ruby={2:4}おし>教えてもらったこと ばかりなんだけどね
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]>If you're looking for a guide to Tabantha,
you've come to the right gal!

<unk[3:0:257]>Even if I did get all my info from random
travelers and merchants who passed
through along the <Color=red>road<Color=white>...

rows.CNzh: 道路？
rows.TWzh: 道路？
rows.JPja: <Ruby={4:8}かいどう>街道？
rows.USen: The road?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>所谓“<Color=red>道路<Color=white>”就是连接
驿站和村子等据点的路。
<unk[3:0:263]>从这里往西走就是<Color=red>利特村<Color=white>，
往东走就是<Color=red>新玛丽塔驿站<Color=white>。
<unk[3:0:263]>道路上还有不少熟悉周边情况的<Color=red>旅行者<Color=white>，
以及买卖各种东西的<Color=red>旅行商人<Color=white>来往。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><Color=red>道路<Color=white>指的就是把驛站或村莊這類	
據點之間互相連接的道路喔。
<unk[3:0:263]>從這裡往西是<Color=red>利特村<Color=white>，
往東則是有座<Color=red>新瑪麗塔驛站<Color=white>。
<unk[3:0:263]>還有，對附近一帶很了解的<Color=red>旅行者<Color=white>，
做各種買賣的<Color=red>旅行商人<Color=white>也很常往返於道路。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Color=red><Ruby={4:8}かいどう>街道<Color=white>ってのは <Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿や<Ruby={2:4}むら>村といった
<Ruby={8:14}きょてんどうし>拠点同士を つないでいる<Ruby={2:4}みち>道のことさね
<unk[3:0:263]>ここからだと <Ruby={2:4}にし>西に<Ruby={2:2}む>向かえば<Color=red>リトの<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>
<Ruby={2:6}ひがし>東に<Ruby={2:2}む>向かえば <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}しん>新マリッタ<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿<Color=white>があるね
<unk[3:0:263]>それから <Ruby={4:10}しゅうへん>周辺のことに<Ruby={2:4}くわ>詳しい<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}たびびと>旅人<Color=white>や
<Ruby={4:8}いろいろ>色々と<Ruby={4:8}ばいばい>売買できる<Color=red><Ruby={6:16}ぎょうしょうにん>行商人<Color=white>も <Ruby={2:2}い>行き<Ruby={2:2}き>来しているよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Yeah, most stables and villages are
connected by well-traveled roads.

<unk[3:0:263]>From here, you can follow them west
to <Color=red>Rito Village<Color=white> or east to <Color=red>New Serenne
Stable<Color=white>.
<unk[3:0:263]>You often encounter <Color=red>travelers<Color=white> on them,
eager to share their folksy knowledge,
and <Color=red>merchants<Color=white> peddling their wares.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>从这里往西走就是<Color=red>利特村<Color=white>，
往东走就是<Color=red>新玛丽塔驿站<Color=white>。
<unk[3:0:263]>道路上还有不少熟悉周边情况的<Color=red>旅行者<Color=white>，
以及买卖各种东西的<Color=red>旅行商人<Color=white>来往。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>從這裡往西是<Color=red>利特村<Color=white>，
往東則是有座<Color=red>新瑪麗塔驛站<Color=white>。
<unk[3:0:263]>還有，對附近一帶很了解的<Color=red>旅行者<Color=white>，
做各種買賣的<Color=red>旅行商人<Color=white>也很常往返於街道。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>ここからだと <Ruby={2:4}にし>西に<Ruby={2:2}む>向かえば<Color=red>リトの<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>
<Ruby={2:6}ひがし>東に<Ruby={2:2}む>向かえば <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}しん>新マリッタ<Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿<Color=white>があるね
<unk[3:0:263]>それから <Ruby={4:10}しゅうへん>周辺のことに<Ruby={2:4}くわ>詳しい<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}たびびと>旅人<Color=white>や
<Ruby={4:8}いろいろ>色々と<Ruby={4:8}ばいばい>売買できる<Color=red><Ruby={6:16}ぎょうしょうにん>行商人<Color=white>も <Ruby={2:2}い>行き<Ruby={2:2}き>来しているよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>From here, you could follow the main
road west to <Color=red>Rito Village<Color=white> or east to
<Color=red>New Serenne Stable<Color=white>.
<unk[3:0:263]>On the road, you'll find <Color=red>travelers<Color=white> ready
to share their folksy knowledge and
<Color=red>merchants<Color=white> peddling their wares.

rows.CNzh: 再见
rows.TWzh: 再見
rows.JPja: さようなら
rows.USen: Goodbye.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>随时都可以再来和我聊天，
不用客气啊！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>無論何時都不用顧慮，
儘管和我搭話吧！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>またいつでも <Ruby={4:8}えんりょ>遠慮なく
<Ruby={2:4}こえ>声をかけとくれよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Don't be a stranger now! Come by and
talk to me whenever you like.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>这么晚辛苦了！
欢迎来到<Color=red>塔邦挞大桥驿站<Color=white>！！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>都這麼晚了，辛苦你了！

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>Good on you for working this late.
Welcome to <Color=red>Tabantha Bridge Stable<Color=white>!

rows.CNzh:
完全复活的乌玛纳利乐团的演奏！<unk[5:0]>
尽情听个够吧！
rows.TWzh:
完全復活的烏瑪納利樂團演奏！<unk[5:0]>
豎起耳朵盡情享受吧！
rows.JPja:
<Ruby={8:16}かんぜんふっかつ>完全復活した ウマナリ<Ruby={4:8}がくだん>楽団の<Ruby={4:8}えんそう>演奏！<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}おも>思う<Ruby={4:8}ぞんぶん>存分 <Ruby={2:2}き>聞いていっておくれ！
rows.USen:
The Stable Trotters are back in full scale!<unk[5:0]>
Come enjoy to your heart's content!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>哎呀！你都湿透了！
欢迎来到<Color=red>塔邦挞大桥驿站<Color=white>！！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:11]>天啊！你全身都濕透了！
歡迎來到<Color=red>塔邦撻大橋驛站<Color=white>！！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]>あれま！ ずぶ<Ruby={2:2}ぬ>濡れじゃないか！
<Color=red>タバンタ<Ruby={8:16}おおはしうまやど>大橋馬宿<Color=white>に ようこそ！！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]>Good heavens, you're soaking wet! Well,
welcome to <Color=red>Tabantha Bridge Stable<Color=white>! Come
and dry yourself off.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>嘿唷～！
欢迎来到<Color=red>塔邦挞大桥驿站<Color=white>！！<unk[5:0]>
我能像这样悠闲休息，
也是托了这些孝顺孩子们的福啦。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>嘿呀！
歡迎來到<Color=red>塔邦撻大橋驛站<Color=white>！！<unk[5:0]>
我能像現在這樣悠閒休息，
也是多虧了我孝順的孩子們呢。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>よっこらしょっと！
<Color=red>タバンタ<Ruby={8:16}おおはしうまやど>大橋馬宿<Color=white>に ようこそ！！<unk[5:0]>
こうして ゆっくり<Ruby={2:4}やす>休めているのも
<Ruby={6:12}おやこうこう>親孝行な<Ruby={4:6}こども>子供たちのおかげでねぇ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>Ahhh... Oh, welcome to <Color=red>Tabantha
Bridge Stable<Color=white>!<unk[5:0]>

Why do I look so relaxed? Because the
children are working hard for me! They're
little dears, each and every one.

rows.CNzh:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>欢迎来到<Color=red>塔邦挞大桥驿站<Color=white>……<unk[5:0]>

rows.TWzh:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>歡迎來到<Color=red>塔邦撻大橋驛站<Color=white>……<unk[5:0]>

看著孩子們的睡臉，工作時的辛勞

rows.JPja:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:7]><Color=red><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>タバンタ<Ruby={8:16}おおはしうまやど>大橋馬宿<Color=white>に ようこそ…<unk[5:0]>

<Ruby={4:6}こども>子供の<Ruby={4:6}ねがお>寝顔を<Ruby={2:2}み>見てると <Ruby={4:6}しごと>仕事の<Ruby={2:4}つか>疲れなんて

rows.USen:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>Welcome to <Color=red>Tabantha Bridge Stable<Color=white>.<unk[5:0]>


When I look at a child's sleeping face, it's like the
day's exhaustion simply melts away.<Size=100>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>欢迎来到<Color=red>塔邦挞大桥驿站<Color=white>♪<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>歡迎來到<Color=red>塔邦撻大橋驛站<Color=white>♪<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:7]><Color=red><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>タバンタ<Ruby={8:16}おおはしうまやど>大橋馬宿<Color=white>に ようこそ♪<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>♪Welcome to <Color=red>Tabantha Bridge Stable<Color=white>.♪<unk[5:0]>


Getting to hear the children perform with
the <Color=red>Stable Trotters<Color=white> really does put a smile
on my face.

rows.CNzh: 大家都很可靠啊。
rows.TWzh: 大家都很可靠呢～
rows.JPja: みんな<Ruby={2:4}たの>頼もしいねぇ
rows.USen: The kids are all so reliable.

rows.CNzh: 一转眼就长这么大了。

rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}おお>大きくなるのは<Ruby={2:4}はや>早いねぇ
rows.USen: They grow up so fast...

rows.CNzh: 热热闹闹的真好啊。
rows.TWzh: 熱熱鬧鬧的真好啊。
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}にぎ>賑やかでいいねぇ
